name: components/dialog
description: A modal window that appears above the main content, blocking interaction with the rest of the page until closed. Provides a complete composition system with Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogCloseButton, DialogContent (with optional close button), DialogHeader, DialogFooter, DialogTitle, and DialogDescription. Includes overlay fade animations, content zoom transitions, and full ARIA dialog/modal semantics. Built on Kobalte Dialog with focus trapping and keyboard Esc-to-close support.
useCases: Form modals for creating or editing records without leaving the current page
Confirmation dialogs for secondary actions such as 'Discard changes?' or 'Save draft?'
Detail inspectors that show expanded information for a selected table row or chart item
Onboarding or feature-announcement modals with header, body content, and footer actions
usage: import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogCloseButton, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogFooter, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogPortal } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/dialog"
